title: Quest Handheld Car Vacuum & Blower with 6 Attachments / 12000Pa High Power Suction/HEPA Nano Filter/Compact Cordless Design/USB Charging/Inflate Airbeds
features: CAR VACUUM CLEANER – This Handheld Vacuum Cleaner makes it easy to clean the interior of your car, as well as various other spaces around the house. Its bagless dust tank holds a capacity of 200ml dry debris, and its HEPA filter ensures fine dust is absorbed.

CORDLESS & COMPACT – With its cordless design making wires unnecessary, cleaning becomes simple in any part of your car. The vacuum supports USB-C fast charging via the included cable, with a total run time of 25 minutes on a full charge giving you ample time to fully clean your vehicle.

LIGHT & POWERFUL – Thanks to its 80W powered motor, the vacuum has a suction force of up to 12KPa, ensuring it will get every bit of dirt and dust. It measures just 17.5 x 22 x 6.5cm, and its ergonomic design makes handheld operation comfortable for extended periods.

ACCESSORIES INCLUDED – A wide variety of accessories, including square and round brush heads, and a short and a long suction nozzle, make it easy to clean all sorts of surfaces. An extra replaceable HEPA filter is included, as well as a blow nozzle for cleaning fine dust.
QUEST APPLIANCES – With a wide range of home appliances like steam irons, hoovers & student essential cooking appliances, you’re sure to find exactly what you need at the Quest Amazon store.
description: Product Description Previous page Cordless Design The vacuum's cordless design gives you freedom of use wherever you take it, with no need for a plug. Powerful & Precise With a max suction power of 12KPa, the vacuum gets all bits of dust and dirt even in tight spaces. HEPA Filter Fitted with a HEPA filter, including a replacement, the vacuum is able to absorb even fine dust. Blower Attachment Use the blower attachment for cleaning fine dust, or for inflating objects such as travel pillows. Accessories Included Two brush heads, two suction nozzles, and the blower attachment allow for varied, precise cleaning. Next page 1 Cordless Design 2 Powerful & Precise 3 HEPA Filter 4 Blower Attachment 5 Accessories Included
